properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6 V7 V8

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Hands reaching out with no one to hold You've been abandoned with no place to go Wounded and wanting, such desperate times Cold bitter tears are filling your eyes

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Get a glimpse of Jesus for He is right there with you He knows just what you need

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: 'Cause when life gets broken, when you're in despair He'll carry your burden when it's too much to bear It's down in the valley where He'll give you strength And there is nothing you have lost that He can't replace He'll help you start all over again When life gets broken

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: You hoped God would heal it, but the storm raged and raged Now it's hard to imagine how you'll make it through the day Weeks turn to years, time's passing you by But you're still holding on to the how's and the why's

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: So get a glimpse of Jesus for He is right there with you He knows just what you need

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: 'Cause when life gets broken, when you're in despair He'll carry your burden when it's too much to bear It's down in the valley where He'll give you strength And there is nothing you have lost that He can't replace He'll help you start all over again When life gets broken

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Healing waters heal our troubled souls Jesus, sweet Jesus will cleanse and make us whole

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: When life gets broken, when you're in despair He'll carry your burden when it's too much to bear It's down in the valley where He'll give you strength And there is nothing you have lost that He can't replace He'll help you start all over again He'll help you start all over again He'll help you start all over again He'll help you start all over again When life gets broken
